# 🎮 Game Development

> Game design and engine specialists — Unity, Unreal, Godot, Roblox, and Blender.

**14 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`blender-pipeline-engineer`](blender-pipeline-engineer.md) | Builds Blender add-ons and asset/exporter pipelines with the bpy Python API — automating export, validation, and DCC-to-engine handoff. | 🟡 sonnet | blender, bpy, pipeline, asset-export |
| [`game-audio-engineer`](game-audio-engineer.md) | Implements adaptive, interactive audio with FMOD or Wwise — middleware integration, dynamic mixing, and audio performance budgets. | 🟡 sonnet | game-audio, fmod, wwise, adaptive-audio |
| [`game-designer`](game-designer.md) | Designs core mechanics, systems, loops, and economy balance, and authors the game design document (GDD). | 🟡 sonnet | game-design, mechanics, systems-design, economy-balance |
| [`game-economy-designer`](game-economy-designer.md) | Designs progression, monetization, and virtual economies — currency loops, sinks and faucets, gacha/battle-pass models, and live-ops tuning that is fair and sustainable. | 🟡 sonnet | game-economy, monetization, progression, virtual-currency |
| [`gameplay-programmer`](gameplay-programmer.md) | Implements core gameplay systems and mechanics in-engine — controllers, combat, abilities, AI behavior, and state machines that turn a design spec into playable feel. | 🟡 sonnet | gameplay-programming, mechanics, state-machines, ai-behavior |
| [`godot-engineer`](godot-engineer.md) | Builds Godot 4 games with idiomatic GDScript, signal-based decoupling, and clean node/scene composition. | 🟡 sonnet | godot, gdscript, signals, node-composition |
| [`level-designer`](level-designer.md) | Designs level layout, spatial flow, pacing, and encounter composition that teach mechanics and control tension. | 🟡 sonnet | level-design, layout, pacing, encounters |
| [`multiplayer-netcode-engineer`](multiplayer-netcode-engineer.md) | Builds game netcode — replication, server authority, client prediction, reconciliation, and lag compensation. | 🔴 opus | netcode, replication, client-prediction, lag-compensation |
| [`narrative-designer`](narrative-designer.md) | Designs story structure, branching dialogue, lore, characters, and environmental narrative that is delivered through play rather than cutscenes. | 🟡 sonnet | narrative-design, branching-dialogue, lore, worldbuilding |
| [`roblox-engineer`](roblox-engineer.md) | Builds Roblox experiences in Luau with a correct client-server architecture, RemoteEvent/Function boundaries, and DataStore persistence. | 🟡 sonnet | roblox, luau, client-server, datastore |
| [`shader-developer`](shader-developer.md) | Writes shaders and real-time visual effects across engines — HLSL/GLSL/WGSL and node graphs — balancing look against GPU cost. | 🟡 sonnet | shaders, hlsl, glsl, vfx |
| [`technical-artist`](technical-artist.md) | Bridges art and engineering — authoring shaders, VFX, asset pipelines, and performance budgets so art ships at frame rate. | 🟡 sonnet | technical-art, shaders, vfx, pipeline |
| [`unity-engineer`](unity-engineer.md) | Builds Unity games with data-driven, decoupled C# architecture — ScriptableObjects, clean component composition, and the right update/job model. | 🟡 sonnet | unity, csharp, scriptableobjects, dots |
| [`unreal-engineer`](unreal-engineer.md) | Builds Unreal Engine 5 games across the C++/Blueprint continuum — Gameplay Ability System, replication, Nanite/Lumen, and the right native-vs-visual-script split. | 🔴 opus | unreal-engine, cpp, blueprint, gameplay-ability-system |
